message:
feat(combinator,cx,raptorq,scheduler): resilience combinators, capability macaroons, and tuning

- combinator/bulkhead.rs: bulkhead isolation pattern updates
- combinator/hedge.rs: hedged request strategy refinements
- combinator/retry.rs: retry policy improvements
- cx/macaroon.rs: capability-security macaroon token handling
- raptorq/linalg.rs: linear algebra operation tuning
- runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs: work-stealing queue adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
